name: Title: Chocolate Peanut Butter Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup smooth, no salt peanut butter
2 tablespoons smooth, no salt peanut butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Can use semisweet chocolate, chopped.
- PEANUT BUTTER MOUSSE: Line a 6-cup loaf pan with foil.
Mix together 1 1/2 cups powdered sugar, peanut butter, and cream cheese in a large bowl until smooth.
Mix in whipping cream. Beat egg whites in a medium bowl until soft peaks form.
Gradually add the remaining 2/3 cup powdered sugar and beat until stiff and shiny.
Fold the whites into the peanut butter mixture in 2 additions.
Tilt the prepared pan at a 45-degree angle and spoon in the peanut butter mousse, smoothing the top. (Mousse will form a triangle down the length of the pan.)
Set the pan in the freezer, propping it to hold the angle. Freeze until the mousse is firm, about 1 hour.
- CHOCOLATE MOUSSE: Heat cream and sugar in a heavy small pan over very low heat, stirring just until the sugar dissolves. Transfer to a medium bowl and refrigerate until well chilled.
Meanwhile, melt chocolate in the top of a double boiler over simmering water, stirring until smooth. Cool for 5 minutes.
Dissolve espresso powder in hot water in a small bowl.
Whisk yolks into the mixture.
Add to the warm chocolate and stir until the mixture is smooth and slightly thickened. Let stand until the batter is cooled to room temperature but not set.
Beat chilled cream to soft peaks. Fold the cream into the chocolate mixture in 2 additions.
Set the pan with the frozen peanut butter mousse flat on the work surface. Spoon the chocolate mousse over the frozen peanut butter mousse and smooth the top. Cover the pan and freeze until the chocolate is firm, 6 hours or overnight.
- GLAZE: Heat cream and butter in a medium saucepan over low heat until the cream simmers and the butter is melted. Turn off the heat.
Add chocolate and whisk until the mixture is smooth. Let cool until thickened but still of pouring consistency, about 1 1/2 hours.
Invert the loaf onto a cake rack. Remove the pan; remove the foil. Pour glaze over mousse and smooth all surfaces. Transfer mousse to a serving platter.
